text.title: Voice UI Basics Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Voice UI Basics. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Intent set is closed at ≤20 high-level goals; out-of-set utterances are routed to a fallback intent.
rule.rationale: Open intent sets explode the disambiguation surface; ≤20 keeps the dialog manager trainable.

rule.statement: Each prompt is ≤15 words (roughly 5 seconds of speech); longer prompts truncate user attention.
rule.rationale: Spoken text >15 words exceeds working-memory; users miss the action.

rule.statement: Every flow handles three error cases explicitly: no-input (silence), no-match (utterance does not map to any intent), and fallback (system error). Each has a recovery path.
rule.rationale: Silent stranding is the #1 voice UX bug; the matrix forces a recovery path for each case.

rule.statement: Destructive intents (delete, cancel, purchase) require an explicit yes/no confirmation prompt; one-shot destructive flows are rejected.
rule.rationale: Voice misrecognition rates make one-shot destructive flows dangerous; the confirmation absorbs the false positive.

rule.statement: Every flow is tested on the target device with real voice (not text simulator); text-only test passes are rejected.
rule.rationale: Real-voice surfaces ASR errors that text simulators hide; without it, flow ships with hidden failures.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do NOT run this methodology — emit a skip-record naming the failed precondition and route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above for flat methodologies), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-voice-ui-basics.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
